name: ai-plugins
description: A multi-harness marketplace of AI coding-assistant plugins. Currently serves Claude Code; structured to also serve Codex and other harnesses that support the plugin concept.

plugins.name: worktrees
plugins.description: Make a repository worktree-ready: per-worktree isolation plus an enforcement guard that protects the main checkout.

plugins.name: engineering-standards
plugins.description: John's standard engineering regime as a reusable, stack-agnostic starting point for any serious project.

plugins.name: babysit-pr
plugins.description: Babysit a pull/merge request to completion across GitHub, Forgejo, and GitLab.
